title: WebJEA Configuration
description: Configuration schema for WebJEA - a web-based JEA execution framework.

Title.description: The page title displayed in WebJEA.

BasePath.description: Default folder path for scripts with relative paths.

LogParameters.description: Log form inputs to the audit log. Can be overridden per command.

PermittedGroups.description: Global access groups in domain\group format. Users in these groups have access to all commands.

HtmlLanguage.description: Default language for HTML output, used by screen readers and assistive technologies.

ShowVerbose.description: Show verbose output when commands are called by global permitted group.

Commands.description: Array of command definitions available in WebJEA.

Id.description: Unique identifier for this command. Used in URL parameters (?id=<value>).

OnloadScript.description: Script to execute on page load. Should not require parameters and should run quickly.

Script.description: Script to parse for form generation and execution.

Synopsis.description: Description text for the landing page. Can contain HTML.

LogParameters.description: Override config-level LogParameters for this command.

PermittedGroups.description: Groups or users with access to this command. Use '*' for all users. Format: domain\group.
